title: Dominated by Fear 2 Containment Breach
description: The rooster crows, the sun rises, the four ghosts take off!
body:
## 【公告/Announcement】
> - 服务端整合包位于**各版本页面底部**，~~如果有的话@~@~~ ；
> - 整合包v3版本后，可互通联机;
> - 服务端整合包Github下载链接地址(**推荐，已接入加速路线**)：[_Github_](https://kkgithub.com/StarCarefree/Dominated-by-Fear-2-serverpack/releases) ；
> - 将不再更新Minecraft1.19.2的整合包版本，请谅解╮（╯＿╰）╭ 。


> - The server-side modpack are located **at the bottom of the page for each version**,~~If there is ServerPack at the bottom of the version @~@~~ ;
> - After the modpack v3 version, you can connect to each other;
> - Server-side modpack Github download link(**Recommended**): [_Github_](https://github.com/StarCarefree/Dominated-by-Fear-2-serverpack/releases) ;
> - The modpack version of Minecraft 1.19.2 will no longer be updated ╮(╯＿╰)╭ .

## 【版权声明/LICENSE】

- 该系列整合包禁止“无脑”搬运，但允许二次创作。
- This series of modpacks prohibits "brainless" transport, allowing secondary creation.

<details>
<summary> E N G L I S H </summary>

# **Welcome to a CRAZY World of Terrifying Monsters**

![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2daf35bc322d24d217147adbd0f2c98525003e7.png)

In this modpack, players will be faced with a variety of terrifying creatures, treacherous environments, and mysterious events, requiring wisdom and courage to survive.

Explore a crazy world, unearth hidden secrets, fight monsters, build shelters, and try to keep yourself alive!

Multiplayer mods and the version that applies to creating the server have been added for those who dare to experience this terrifying survival with Friends !

---

### **【W A R N I N G】**


- **Modpack Compatibility:** This modpack has modules that conflict with OptiFine, so please refrain from adding them randomly.

- **Health Restrictions:** **_People with a history of heart disease or epilepsy are advised against playing this Modpack._**

- **Client and server support:** This Modpack supports both client and server operation.

---

### Acknowledgments:

**[Music Provided]**

Magnetic_Trailer    -    StudioKolomna    -    MusiQO    -    Tim_Kulig_Free_Music    -    dave_wheatley     -   makesoundmusic    -    fredsylvestre66    -    NewVibes

---

**[Mod comments]**

FlareStar   -   喵仁(VR)

---

### About [DoF1]

Since the second generation has been released, DoF1 will stop updating and optimizing. ~~There is a big difference between the Gen 1 and Gen 2 modpack monsters, so the Gen modpack is still worth experiencing.~~

Tunnel: [Dominated by Fear](https://modrinth.com/modpack/dominated-by-fear)

---

### **~~👻 And remember, keep an eye on your back while playing .~~**

</details>

[**_~~通向MCMOD的隧道~~_**](https://www.mcmod.cn/modpack/882.html)

# **欢迎来到一个充满恐怖怪物的世界**

![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2daf35bc322d24d217147adbd0f2c98525003e7.png)

在这个整合包中，玩家将面对各种恐怖生物、险恶环境以及神秘事件，需要运用智慧和勇气来生存下去。

探索疯狂的世界，挖掘隐藏的秘密，与怪物战斗，建造庇护所，并尽力让自己活下去！

其中还添加了多人联机模组并且适配了服务器，快去和别人一起体验这个恐怖生存吧！

---

### **【重 要 提 示】**

- **整合包兼容性:** 本整合包拥有与 OptiFine 相互冲突的模组，请不要随意添加。

- **健康限制:** **_有心脏病或癫痫病史的人士不建议玩这个整合包。_**

- **支持客户端与服务端:** 本整合包同时支持客户端和服务端运行。

---

### 鸣谢：

**[音乐提供]**

Magnetic_Trailer    -    StudioKolomna    -    MusiQO    -    Tim_Kulig_Free_Music    -    dave_wheatley     -   makesoundmusic    -    fredsylvestre66    -    NewVibes

---

**[教程提供（联机）]**

[云默安 _OpenFrp_](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1QN411a7fP/?spm_id_from=333.337.search-card.all.click)    -    [鸽秋0v0 _BakaXL_](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1xJ4m1L7dQ/?spm_id_from=333.337.search-card.all.click)

---

**[模组帮助]**

耀星   -   喵仁(VR)

---

### 关于一代整合包【DoF1】

由于二代已经发布，所以DoF1将停止更新及优化。~~一代和二代整合包怪物差别很大，所以一代整合包还是很值得体验的。~~

隧道：[Dominated by Fear](https://modrinth.com/modpack/dominated-by-fear)

---

### **~~👻 在游玩本整合包时，请注意自己的身后。~~**
